name: PrepareAccountNumberForPersist
businessLogic: Retrieve PMInternalDataModel from SlotsDTO and get the list of persisted process contexts.
Iterate over each persisted ProcessContext and parse the commandStatus JSON to find the first result containing 'acctNum'.
Extract the account number from the first matching result node; break out of the loop once found.
If no account number is found in any context, log an error and return early.
Retrieve DepositAccountEntity from SlotsDTO and set the extracted account number on it; log an error if the entity is null.
Retrieve DocumentDetailsEntity from SlotsDTO and set the extracted account number on it; log an error if the entity is null.
